channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trinidad and Tobago signs data center deals with U.S. companies amid chronic water shortages
item.description: Memorandums of understanding were signed with Hummingbird AI Holdings and Ernst and Young LLP.

item.title: U.S.-Iran ceasefire 'facade' crumbles after largest fighting in months, raising risk of escalation
item.description: "I have a feeling that this could go poop very fast, and that's the fear once you unleash the dogs of war."

item.title: Hormuz route remains open despite Iran declaration, maritime group says
item.description: The Joint Maritime Information Center notes the path along the Omani coastline is still available for transit.

item.title: Graham's death triggers succession process in South Carolina
item.description: South Carolina Governor Henry McMaster, a Republican, can appoint a successor to serve the remainder of Graham's term.
